method_description: Step 1: Standalone opt-out page at /optout asks for email address, user completes reCAPTCHA v2, clicks 'Send verification link'. Step 2: Verification email is sent; user must click the link in the email. Step 3: Link opens a form requiring: (a) name, (b) ContactOut profile URL, (c) LinkedIn profile URL. Name plus at least one URL is compulsory. Step 4: Complete CAPTCHA and submit. No public name+city+state search exists — PIR cannot discover the user's profile URL without a public search.
bot_check: reCAPTCHA v2 on the initial opt-out page (Step 1). Confirmed: data-sitekey present, google.com/recaptcha/api.js loaded, standard reCAPTCHA v2 checkbox widget rendered. A second CAPTCHA is present on the removal form (Step 4) after clicking the verification link.
notes: ContactOut is a B2B professional contact data platform (email finder for recruiters and salespeople). Opt-out URL found at /optout, confirmed by the privacy_data_subjects page which states: 'you may opt out here: https://www.contactout.com/optout'. Full opt-out flow (confirmed by manual testing beyond agent's automated reach): (1) enter email + reCAPTCHA v2 → send verification link, (2) click link in verification email, (3) fill form with name + ContactOut profile URL + LinkedIn profile URL (name plus at least one URL is required), (4) complete CAPTCHA + submit. Tier 1 fails on 'Allows Search': no public search by name + city + state exists. All search features (homepage search, /people-search, /search-portal, /search) redirect to /register or /login, requiring account creation. Without a public search, PIR cannot discover whether a user has a record or find their ContactOut profile URL (which the removal form requires). The 'Non-sensitive' Tier 1 check passes — name, email, and profile URL are all acceptable per the rubric. Email verification is a Tier 2 Confirmation concern (PIR supports email confirmation per the rubric). The form uses reCAPTCHA v2 (supported type). California check not applicable as the opt-out form has no state selection field — same single-field email form for all users. B2B scope concern: ContactOut serves professional/business contact data, not traditional consumer people-search data. Footer contains 'Do Not Sell My Info' text but no clickable link was found for it. Privacy policy page links to /privacy_data_subjects for data subject rights. Privacy policy also states users can opt out by emailing support@contactout.com.
